items.title: Version of AI tool 'too powerful for public' released to public
items.dek: Claude Fable 5 is a version of Anthropic's Claude Mythos, an AI program which caused a stir among technology, finance, and government leaders.
items.body: Claude Fable 5 is a version of Anthropic's Claude Mythos, an AI program which caused a stir among technology, finance, and government leaders.

items.title: Trump says Iran shot down US helicopter and vows to respond
items.dek: Two crew members of the Apache helicopter that crashed following the attack were rescued by an American sea drone.
items.body: Two crew members of the Apache helicopter that crashed following the attack were rescued by an American sea drone.
